title: sesleria albicans subsp. angustifolia
intro: Sesleria albicans subsp. angustifolia, also known as Balkan sesleria or Narrow-leaved Balkan sesleria, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, and research has shown that it possesses anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and fighting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Sesleria albicans subsp. angustifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
